name: n8n-nodes-docuprox
description: A n8n Node for processing files and base64 data using the Docuprox API. Easily integrate automated document processing and data extraction into your applications.

scripts.copy-assets: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const srcDir='nodes/DocuProx';const dstDir='dist/nodes/DocuProx';if(fs.existsSync(srcDir)){fs.mkdirSync(dstDir,{recursive:true});for(const f of fs.readdirSync(srcDir)){if(f.endsWith('.svg'))fs.copyFileSync(path.join(srcDir,f),path.join(dstDir,f));}}"
